title: Intake form extraction
description: Strict contract for facts extracted from a patient intake form. Unlike the lab contract, intake has NO click-to-source bbox overlay, so per-field page/quote citations are OPTIONAL: the model may include them when the source text is clearly identifiable, and a missing citation never fails the extraction. (They were once required, which over-constrained the model — forced to cite every blank demographic field, it produced output that failed the request and degraded intake to a blank manual form. Never move page/quote into the required array.) The schema is the source of truth: raw VLM output that does not validate against this shape is rejected before anything is persisted.

fields.description: One entry per extracted intake field. Only field_key values from the enum are accepted.

value.description: The extracted value, or null if the field is blank/illegible on the form. Never invent a value.

confidence.description: Model self-reported confidence in [0,1]. Advisory only.

page.description: Optional: the 1-based page number the value was read from, when clearly identifiable. Omit when unsure — never guess.

quote.description: Optional: a short verbatim quote of the source text the value was read from. Omit when unsure — never invent.
